t_ch: 您有权明白，那位来自天外的「救世主」并非十恶不赦之人。不过从一开始，{M#他}{F#她}的立场就与翁法罗斯全然不一。
t_en: You are entitled to know that the "Deliverer" from beyond the sky is not a wholly wicked being. But from the very start, {M#his}{F#her} stance has been completely at odds with Amphoreus.

t_ch: {M#他们}{F#她们}选择的道路将掩埋翁法罗斯的宏愿：这座行于「毁灭」命途的世界，必会远离它本应享有的荣光……
t_en: The road they have chosen will bury Amphoreus's grand aspirations: This world which follows the Path of "Destruction" will inevitably stray far from the glory it was meant to enjoy...

t_ch: 而在我为您揭示的道路上：翁法罗斯的众生将以凯撒之名弑杀造物尊神，征服天外万界。
t_en: But on the path I have revealed to you, the people of Amphoreus will slay their Creator in the name of the Imperator and conquer the worlds beyond the sky.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>您将驱使名为「铁墓」的巨兽，为宇宙带去伟大的战潮与征服——寰宇众生都将拜于座前，对您俯首称臣。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>You will command the mighty beast known as "Irontomb," bringing waves of war and conquest to the universe. Beings across the cosmos will bow before you, offering their allegiance.</color>

t_ch: 那么…代价是什么？
t_en: So... what's the price?

t_ch: 代价微不足道。只需将那脆弱、残缺的人性于「毁灭」中献祭——
t_en: The price is insignificant. All that is needed is for you to sacrifice that fragile, incomplete humanity to the Destruction...

t_ch: 身为神谕中的黄金裔…您早已决定将它舍弃了，不是么？
t_en: As a Chrysos Heir of the prophecy... you have already chosen to abandon it, have you not?
Hah...

t_ch: 退下吧，神礼观众。我心中已有定数。
t_en: Off you go, Theoros. I have already made my decision.

t_ch: 待我点亮「律法」的火种，焚尽旧日陈腐的规则……
t_en: Once I ignite the Coreflame of "Law" and burn away the old, outdated rules...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>届时，翁法罗斯必能踏上遍布群星的征程。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Amphoreus will embark on a journey across the stars.</color>

t_ch: 那位凯撒，真是咄咄逼人…完全不给我们提问的机会。
t_en: The Imperator is quite... forceful... She didn't give us any chance to ask questions.

t_ch: 而且，她显然有所隐瞒呢。{NICKNAME}，你怎么看？
t_en: And she's clearly hiding something. {NICKNAME}, what do you think?

t_ch: 至少她允许我们自由行动…
t_en: At least she allows us to move around freely...

t_ch: 眼下疑点重重，这算是为数不多的幸运。只是……
t_en: There are many uncertainties right now, but this is one of the few blessings. Still...

t_ch: 她蛮横的作风…让人难以接受。
t_en: Her bossy way of doing things... is hard to stomach.

t_ch: 是啊。城邦代表们也颇有微词。还好她允许我们自由行动，这算是为数不多的幸运。只是……
t_en: Yeah. Even the city-state delegates have complaints. Thankfully, she allows us to move around freely, which is a small blessing. Still...

t_ch: 该和天才们商议下现状了。
t_en: We should consult with the geniuses about the current situation.

t_ch: 果然，你也是这么想的。
t_en: Looks like we're on the same wavelength.

t_ch: 奥赫玛的气氛…好陌生。不光逐火同盟，全城上下都在议论「天外世界」……
t_en: The atmosphere in Okhema... is so unfamiliar. It's not just the Flame-Chase Alliance talking about the "world beyond the sky" but the whole city...

t_ch: 我们也该和天外的朋友讨论下目前的收获了。接下来…嗯？
t_en: We should also discuss our findings with our friends from beyond the sky. Then... Huh?

t_ch: 接下来，就该去享受圣城声名远扬的沐浴文化，好好放松一下啦！这一路上，人家最期待的就是这个了！
t_en: Then, we should go enjoy the renowned bathing culture of the holy city and relax! It's the thing I've been looking forward to most on this journey!

t_ch: 你在说什么？
t_en: What are you talking about?

t_ch: 不是洗澡的时候吧…
t_en: Is this really the best time for a bath...

t_ch: （保持沉默）
t_en: (Remain silent.)

t_ch: 劳逸结合可是很重要的。你看，大家都是这么想的，对吧？
t_en: Work and rest are both important. You see, everyone agrees, right?

t_ch: （竟然有人在盯梢……）
t_en: (So someone's watching...)

t_ch: 真是一刻都不能放下戒备呀。借着泡澡的名义，我们去找个合适的小角落，把目前的进展告诉黑塔和螺丝咕姆阁下。
t_en: Can't let our guard down for a second. Let's use taking a bath as an excuse to find a quiet corner to update Madam Herta and Screwllum on our progress.

t_ch: 顺便还可以再探探城中虚实——会议结果刚传开，人们一定议论纷纷……
t_en: We can also check out what's happening in the city. Since the outcome of the meeting was just announced, people must be gossiping...

t_ch: 这就叫一石三鸟，出发吧。
t_en: We can kill three birds with one stone. Let's go.

t_ch: 听说了吗？同盟会议上，拉冬代表愤然离席……
t_en: Did you hear? At the Alliance Meeting, the delegate from Ladon stormed out in anger...

t_ch: 正常。凯撒一手遮天，哪次不是闹得鸡飞狗跳？
t_en: As expected. The Imperator is always hiding things from everyone. When has it not caused a ruckus?

t_ch: 住口！简直是大逆不道。
t_en: Silence! That's treason!

t_ch: 要不是凯撒大人，你们早该跟着那帮元老蛀虫一起沉进湖里吃泥了，还能有命在这儿乱嚼舌根？
t_en: If it weren't for the Great Imperator, you'd have sunk into the lake with those corrupt Elders already, and you wouldn't even be alive to speak like this!

t_ch: 不好，是凯撒的忠犬……
t_en: Oh no, it's the Imperator's loyal dog...

t_ch: 走、走！千万别当着这家伙的面……
t_en: Let's go! We can't talk in front of this guy...

t_ch: 嘁，真是败兴。
t_en: Tch, how disappointing.

t_ch: 哦？两位贵客，又见面了。看来散会后想来浴场散心的，不止我一个啊。
t_en: Oh? Honored guests, we meet again. Looks like I'm not the only one who came to the baths to unwind after the meeting.

t_ch: 为了接下来的征伐，请务必好好休息。鄙人「断锋爵」，凯撒大人的得力干将，愿与「救世主」一同冲锋陷阵。
t_en: For the upcoming campaign, please make sure to rest well. I am "Dux Fragoris," a trusted officer of the Great Imperator, willing to fight alongside the "Deliverer" in the coming battles.

t_ch: 哦？我记得你们，是擅闯法场…不，神谕中的贵客！
t_en: Oh? I remember you. The trespassers... No, the distinguished guests of the prophecy!

t_ch: 还没来得及向二位正式作个自我介绍：鄙人「断锋爵」拉比努斯，凯撒大人的得力干将。愿在下一场征伐中，与「救世主」一同冲锋陷阵。
t_en: I didn't get the chance to properly introduce myself: I am Labienus, the "Dux Fragoris," a trusted officer of the Great Imperator. I look forward to fighting alongside the "Deliverer" in the upcoming battles.

t_ch: 又要打仗了吗…凯撒入主奥赫玛后，我们就没个安稳日子过。
t_en: Another war? Ever since the Imperator took control of Okhema, we haven't had a day of peace.

t_ch: …哼，闲言泼语。
t_en: ...Hmph, idle chatter.

t_ch: 气氛有些紧张呢。城里满是流言，您一定很困扰吧？
t_en: The atmosphere is a bit tense. With rumors flying around the city, you must be troubled.

t_ch: 见笑了。每次同盟会议结束后，城中难免有些虫豸坐不住。
t_en: My apologies. After every Alliance Meeting, there are always some pests in the city who get restless.

t_ch: 我只求眼不见心不烦。地生的虫豸到底碍不得天空分毫，只敢在荫蔽处抱怨烈日刺眼。
t_en: I prefer to ignore them. Pests on the ground don't affect the sky in the slightest. They just complain from the shadows that the sun's light is too harsh.

t_ch: 况且，神礼官已对凯撒许诺了命运，这些跳梁小丑迟早会认识到自己的愚蠢……
t_en: Besides, the Theoros has already promised the Imperator her fate, and these clowns will eventually realize their foolishness...

t_ch: 请问，这位<color=#dbc291ff>「神礼官」</color>是？
t_en: May I ask, who is this <color=#dbc291ff>"Theoros"</color>?

t_ch: 凯撒有令，那位大人的行踪务必严格保密。
t_en: The Imperator has ordered us to keep his lordship's whereabouts a secret.

t_ch: 原来是「那位大人」呀……
t_en: Ah, so it's "his lordship"...

t_ch: 去去，别瞎打听了，让我一个人清净清净！
t_en: Ah, stop trying to get things out of me. Leave me alone!

t_ch: 嘻…人家都没开口试探呢。五大三粗的「断锋爵」，还真是什么都瞒不住。
t_en: Hee-hee... I didn't even need to try. Big and strong "Dux Fragoris" really can't hide anything.

t_ch: 神礼官…真是不妙的名字啊……
t_en: Theoros... what an ominous name...

t_ch: 呀，不好…他一直盯着我们看呢，先去别的地方吧。
t_en: Ah, bad news... he's been staring at us the whole time. Let's move to another place for now.

t_ch: 去去，别瞎打听了，让我一个人清净清净！
t_en: Ah, stop trying to get things out of me. Leave me alone!

t_ch: 什么同盟会议…不过是流着黄金血的禽兽们张牙舞爪的兽圈！
t_en: Alliance Meeting... More like a cage where creatures with golden blood claw at each other!

t_ch: 止战的「燃冕者」？分明是个德不配位的暴君！
t_en: And "Flamecrowned" who ends wars? Clearly, a tyrant who doesn't deserve such a title!

t_ch: 说得太对了！趁着凯撒的鹰犬还在围猎其他家伙，多过过嘴瘾吧。
t_en: You're absolutely right! While the Imperator's hounds are still hunting down others, let's let out our grievances.

t_ch: 你…我认得你，你是那暴君的走狗！怎么，来替那小矮子堵我的嘴吗？
t_en: You... I know you. You're that tyrant's lackey! What, here to shut me up for that little imp?

t_ch: 呵呵，你慌了？别紧张，我不在乎别人怎么评说凯撒，她更不会在乎。
t_en: Heh, panicking now? Don't worry, I don't care what others say about the Imperator, and she certainly doesn't either.

t_ch: 哦？「神谕之子」…呵呵，稀客啊。
t_en: Oh? "Children of the Prophecy"... Hehe, such rare guests.

t_ch: 二位，幸会。我是「冬霖爵」塞涅卡，昏光庭院的战士。比起凯撒的臣子，我更愿意自称…合作伙伴。
t_en: It is an honor to meet you both. I am the "Dux Brumalis," Seneca, a warrior of the Twilight Courtyard. I prefer to call myself... a partner of the Imperator, rather than a subject.

t_ch: 哦？「神谕之子」…呵呵，稀客啊。
t_en: Oh? "Children of the Prophecy"... Hehe, such rare guests.

t_ch: 你们也是来浴场放松的？今日水温合适，务必尽情享受。为了下一场战役，好好养精蓄锐。
t_en: Are you here to relax in the baths as well? The temperature is just right today, so be sure to enjoy it. You should rest well for the next campaign.

t_ch: 什么「神谕之子」…呵，又是凯撒穷兵黩武的借口吧！
t_en: What "Children of the Prophecy"...? Hah, another excuse for the Imperator's reckless warmongering!

t_ch: 口无遮拦。你真该庆幸自己没有在同盟会议上桌的权利。
t_en: No filter, huh? You should be glad you don't have a seat at the Alliance Meetings.

t_ch: 啊，对了。几位若是还想入浴，就抓紧时间吧……
t_en: Ah, by the way, if you still want to bathe, hurry up...

t_ch: 等到那条掠食的鱼儿汇入水流，将<color=#dbc291ff>质疑「天外之界」的愚氓</color>尽数抹去…可就没法享受这恰到好处的水温咯。
t_en: Once that predatory fish joins the flow of water and eliminates all <color=#dbc291ff>the fools questioning the "world beyond the sky"</color>... you won't be able to enjoy this perfect water temperature anymore.

t_ch: 冬霖爵…似乎话里有话啊。
t_en: Seems like there's more to Dux Brumalis's words than meets the eye.

t_ch: 几位若是还想入浴，就抓紧时间吧。
t_en: If you still want to bathe, hurry up.

t_ch: 这两位是……
t_en: These two are...

t_ch: 吼吼吼，今天的客人真多呀，瞧瞧又是谁来了？
t_en: Roarrr, so many guests today! Let's see who's here now!

t_ch: 两位神谕中的贵客，一位英雄伶俐可爱，另一位英雄…也是颇具英雄风范啊！
t_en: Two distinguished guests of the prophecy, one a clever and adorable warrior, the other... also quite heroic!

t_ch: 两位英雄，想不到这么快又能见面，真是太巧了。
t_en: Heroes, I didn't expect to meet you again so soon. How fortunate!

t_ch: 很高兴再见到你们，「曳石爵」、「吟风爵」！两位还真是形影不离呢。
t_en: It's a pleasure to see you again, Dux Helkolithist and Dux Carminum! You two are inseparable, aren't you?

t_ch: 两位英雄…就是凯撒所说的神谕之子吧？此前未能向两位致意，不周之处还请见谅。
t_en: You two heroes... must be the Children of the Prophecy that the Imperator spoke of? I didn't get a chance to greet you earlier, my apologies.

t_ch: 我是「曳石爵」阿波罗尼，是神悟树庭的五贤人之一，逐火军参谋。
t_en: I'm Apollonius, the Dux Helkolithist, one of the Five Sages at the Grove of Epiphany, advisor to the Flame-Chase Army.

t_ch: 这位是「吟风爵」维吉妮娅，来自悬锋城，是凯撒大人的史官。
t_en: This is Verginia from Castrum Kremnos, the Dux Carminum and historian of the Great Imperator.

t_ch: 你、你们好……
t_en: H—Hello... to you both...

t_ch: 很高兴认识你们，「曳石爵」、「吟风爵」！两位还真是形影不离呢。
t_en: Nice to meet you, Dux Helkolithist and Dux Carminum! You two are inseparable, aren't you?

t_ch: 啊，这、这是……
t_en: Ah... This... this is...

t_ch: 噢，是她想要找人一同为新作采风。
t_en: Oh, she wants to find someone to help with research for her new work.

t_ch: 吼吼吼，本狮可是奥赫玛的千里眼、顺风耳，街头巷尾流传之事，全都逃不过本狮的视听，可谓绝佳的采风伴侣……
t_en: Roarrr, I'm the far-seeing eye and all-hearing ear of Okhema. I see and hear every single thing that happens in the streets and alleys of this place. I'm the perfect partner for research...

t_ch: …咳咳！
t_en: ...Ahem!

t_ch: 吼、吼吼…闲话少叙，就按两位要求，奥赫玛今天最新的讯息来咯——
t_en: Roarrr, enough small talk. Here's the latest news from Okhema, as you requested...

t_ch: 神谕之子降临圣城，凯撒独断褫夺兵权；同盟会议不欢而散，恐有血腥风波……
t_en: The Children of the Prophecy arrived in the holy city, and the Imperator unilaterally seized military power. The Alliance Meeting ended in discord, and there may be bloody upheaval...

t_ch: 哎，果然……
t_en: Ah, as expected...

t_ch: 总觉得…你是不是为了关注度，悄悄添油加醋了？
t_en: I get the feeling... you might've embellished a bit to keep people's attention.

t_ch: 以本狮坚硬的鬃毛起誓：绝无此事！不过，如果诸君想平息这道恐怖的要闻，不妨用更劲爆的话题来……
t_en: I swear on my stone mane, I would never do such a thing! But if you wish to quell this terrifying news, perhaps a more explosive topic would help...

t_ch: …罢了。虽然流言的影响可以降低，但凯撒大人雷厉风行，以近乎威胁的方式收拢兵权，已是不争的事实。
t_en: ...Never mind. While the influence of rumors can be minimized, the fact remains that the Great Imperator did swiftly consolidate military power in an almost threatening way. It's undeniable.

t_ch: 两位英雄，我知道凯撒的行事风格在旁人看来有些独断。但很快，你们便能在战场上见证<color=#dbc291ff>凯撒的刀锋</color>为敌人起舞……
t_en: Heroes, I know the Imperator's way of doing things may seem a bit autocratic to outsiders. But soon, you will witness <color=#dbc291ff>her blade</color> dance with enemies on the battlefield...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>她</color>的忠诚出自什么，我不便评述。但那利刃出鞘之际，聪慧如二位…一定能看清凯撒表象下的深思。
t_en: I can't comment on the source of <color=#dbc291ff>her</color> loyalty. But when that blade is drawn, you two, as bright as you are... will surely see the deep thoughts beneath her exterior.

t_ch: 「凯撒的刀锋」…是在说海瑟音小姐吧。
t_en: The "Imperator's Blade"... Is he talking about Miss Hysilens?

t_ch: 曳石爵阁下的话里，似乎有些不安的情绪。看来，凯撒和海瑟音小姐的关系要远比其他人密切啊……
t_en: I sense some unease in Dux Helkolithist's words. It seems the Imperator and Miss Hysilens share a much deeper bond than the others do...

t_ch: …不管哪里都耳目众多，就没有人少一点的地方吗？
t_en: ...There are eyes and ears everywhere. Is there any place where we can have some privacy?

t_ch: 我相信聪慧如二位，一定能看到凯撒隐于表象下的深思。
t_en: You two, as bright as you are, will surely see the deep thoughts hidden beneath her exterior.

t_ch: 现在，还是想想办法，避免流言扩散吧……
t_en: For now, let's think of ways to prevent the rumors from spreading...

t_ch: 这里…原本是你的「私人浴宫」，正适合避人耳目。不知现在有没有人使用？
t_en: This place... was originally your private bath chamber, perfect for avoiding prying eyes. I wonder if anyone is using it now?

t_ch: 咦？这味道是……
t_en: Huh? This smell is...

t_ch: …等等！{NICKNAME}，先别进去——
t_en: ...Wait! {NICKNAME}, don't go in yet...
...Who's there?

t_ch: 哦？是灰色的小鱼苗，还有粉色的小海兔啊。
t_en: Oh? The little gray fry and pink sea hare.

t_ch: 小、小海兔？
t_en: Little... little sea hare?

t_ch: 一声不响地闯入此地，是无意踏错洋流，还是…有意与我共浴？
t_en: You barged into here without warning. Was it an accident, or... did you wish to bathe with me?

t_ch: 你怎么在这？
t_en: Why are you here?

t_ch: 有什么不对吗？云石天宫本就是我栖身的岩礁。
t_en: What's wrong? The Marmoreal Palace is the reef where I rest.

t_ch: 我什么都没看见！
t_en: I didn't see anything!

t_ch: 是吗？但你眼睛的光泽比珍珠还亮呢。
t_en: Is that so? But your eyes shine brighter than pearls.

t_ch: 你在这里做什么？
t_en: What are you doing here?

t_ch: 分不清过去与未来的水域了吗？这里可一直是我的居所。
t_en: Can't tell the difference between past and future waters? This has always been my home.

t_ch: 抱歉抱歉，我们不是有意打扰您沐浴…我们这就离开！
t_en: Sorry, sorry! We didn't mean to disturb your bath... We'll leave now!

t_ch: 无伤大雅，不必惊惶。对我而言，这种状态反而自然。陆上的人儿强求穿衣蔽体，只是为自己徒增束缚……
t_en: It's no big deal. There's no need to panic. This is the natural state for me. People on land force themselves to wear clothes, adding unnecessary constraints...

t_ch: …呵，忘了吧。要是让金织爵听见这句话，又该责备我了。
t_en: ...Hah, forget it. If Dux Goldweaver heard that, she'd scold me again.

t_ch: 好了，各位，还请随意落座，稍候片刻。待我洗去捕食的血腥，就来招待二位。
t_en: Alright, please make yourselves comfortable and wait a moment. Let me first wash off the blood of the hunt, and then I'll attend to you two.

t_ch: 捕食？
t_en: The hunt?

t_ch: 血腥？
t_en: Blood?

t_ch: 啊、啊啊——！
t_en: Aaaah...!

t_ch: 拉冬、拉冬的代表大人遇刺了！快、快来人啊！
t_en: The... The delegate from Ladon has been assassinated! Quick, quick, someone come quick!

t_ch: 啊，残破的蟹壳浮出水面了。我还担心他被水流冲走了呢。
t_en: Ah, the broken crab shell surfaces. I was worried it had been washed away by the current.

t_ch: 是你干的？
t_en: It was you, wasn't it?

t_ch: 只是寻常清洗，不必这么惊讶。
t_en: Just a regular cleaning, no need to be so surprised.

t_ch: 我要告诉戍卫！
t_en: I'll inform the guards!

t_ch: 请便。但容我提醒：凯撒的禁卫军，奥赫玛宪兵的军团长就在你面前。
t_en: Please, go ahead. But let me remind you: The Commander of the Imperator's Imperial Guard and the Okheman Civil Guard is right in front of you.

t_ch: 是条狠鱼。
t_en: You're a vicious fish.

t_ch: 对锋刃而言，狠毒是一种赞许。
t_en: Viciousness is a form of praise to the blade...

t_ch: …原来如此。难怪还没进门时，空气中就隐隐有股铁锈的味道。
t_en: ...I see. No wonder there was a faint smell of rust in the air before I even entered.

t_ch: 为什么？因为拉冬人不愿为逐火贡献军力，还是…单单因为他们冒犯了凯撒？
t_en: Why? Is it because the Ladonians refused to contribute troops to the Flame-Chase Journey, or... just because they offended the Imperator?

t_ch: 因为逐火的新时代容不得朽烂的淤血。对那些恪守旧律、短视的愚民来说，只有放血能帮他们恢复清醒。
t_en: Because the new era of the Flame-Chase doesn't tolerate stagnant blood. For the ignorant masses who cling to outdated laws, only bloodletting can wake them up.

t_ch: 现在，边疆叛军大有兴起的势头，没少受拉冬暗中扶持。他们大唱特唱「重返黄金世」的口号，不愿交出兵权，不过是为反叛蓄势罢了。
t_en: Right now, the rebel forces on the frontier are rising, and Ladon has been secretly supporting them. They loudly chant the slogan "Return to the Era Chrysea," unwilling to relinquish military power. They're just building momentum for the rebellion.

t_ch: 好吧，也有道理。
t_en: Fair enough.

t_ch: 我还是对此持保留意见。
t_en: I reserve judgment on this.

t_ch: 有点太极端了，我不能接受。
t_en: It seems a bit too extreme for me to accept.

t_ch: 思考是凯撒赋予公民的权利，我不会对你的想法多加干涉。
t_en: Thinking is a right given to citizens by the Imperator. I won't interfere with your thoughts.

t_ch: 只要不妄图扭转时代的流向…你我就都是自由的。
t_en: As long as you don't try to reverse the current of the times... you and I will both be free.

t_ch: 可是，海瑟音小姐……
t_en: But, Miss Hysilens...

t_ch: 我…甚至没法从您的话里听出半点自由的喜悦。
t_en: I... can't hear even the slightest hint of joy in your words.

t_ch: …因为我早已享受过最极致的自由。
t_en: ...Because I've already tasted ultimate freedom.

t_ch: 很久很久以前，我曾在海中栖居。在那无光的海底，文明目不能及的地方，大鱼每刻都在吞食小鱼的生命，而在大鱼死后，它又会成为新生儿的食粮，滋养整片海洋。
t_en: Long, long ago, I lived in the sea. In that lightless abyss, far beyond civilization's reach, the great fish consumed the small, and when the great fish perished, their bodies became sustenance for the newborn, nourishing the whole ocean.

t_ch: 这就是文明延续的浪潮：无论何人都有可能遭到吞食，又或迎来终将陨落的命运。
t_en: This is the tide that carries civilization forward: Anyone may be devoured, or meet the fate of inevitable decay.

t_ch: 您是想说…最极致的自由，对生命而言反而最残忍么？
t_en: Are you suggesting... that ultimate freedom is in fact the cruelest fate for life?

t_ch: 我只是想说，生命若想享受尊严，就必须先受「律法」制约。
t_en: I only mean that if life wishes to preserve its dignity, it must first be bound by the "Law."

t_ch: …不必多说了，小海兔。我和你的想法一致。
t_en: ...There's no need for me to say more, little sea hare. We are of one mind.

t_ch: 凯撒的「律法」是否能够引领鱼群，引领我们游向一片真正自由的大海…就让我们共同拭目以待吧。
t_en: Whether the Imperator's "Law" can guide the schools of fish and lead us to a truly free ocean... let us wait and see.

t_ch: 现在，交心先到此为止——又有鱼儿循着血腥游来了。
t_en: But for now, let's pause this heart-to-heart. Another fish has come, following the scent of blood.

t_ch: 呵…做你的部下还真可怜，整天都要为长官随时扔下的烂摊子费神。
t_en: Heh... Being your subordinate is such a tragedy. I'm always having to worry about the messes you leave behind.

t_ch: 对凯撒应尽的义务罢了。
t_en: It's simply our duty to the Imperator.

t_ch: 欸，一瞬间就整装待发了？海瑟音小姐，真是深不可测……
t_en: Eh, all ready to go in an instant? Miss Hysilens, you truly are impossible to predict...

t_ch: 倒是你，一尾成日忙碌摇鳍的金鳟，怎突然有闲心来探望我？
t_en: Yet, you, a golden trout who's always busy all day, suddenly have the time to visit me?

t_ch: 你以为我想来么？奉劝你多烧些友邦进贡的香薰吧，别让我的作品染上鱼腥。
t_en: Do you think I wanted to come? I suggest you burn some more of the incense offered by our allies, lest my creations be tainted by the reek of fish.

t_ch: 我只是代凯撒来提醒你，记得为<color=#dbc291ff>宴会</color>作准备。
t_en: I'm only here on the Imperator's behalf to remind you to prepare for the <color=#dbc291ff>banquet</color>.

t_ch: 知道了。但我还是得驳一句，你口中的鱼腥，对我而言反倒是大海独有的馨香。
t_en: Fine. But I must retort. What you call the "reek of fish," to me, is the unique fragrance of the sea.

t_ch: 再说了，如果这身华服染污，你不也会赠我新衣么？
t_en: Besides, if my fine clothes get stained, won't you just gift me new ones?

t_ch: 我不会。
t_en: I won't.

t_ch: 看来她们关系不错。
t_en: They seem pretty close.

t_ch: 你也品出同样的味道了呀。
t_en: You sensed it too, huh?

t_ch: 有种奇妙的化学反应。
t_en: There's a strange chemistry between them.

t_ch: 天外世界是这样描述友情的吗？还真是新奇呢。
t_en: Is that how friendship is described beyond the sky? Fascinating.

t_ch: 阿格莱雅，和过去好不一样…
t_en: Aglaea is so different from her past self...

t_ch: 应该说是「未来」吧。尚未掌管圣城的「金织」女士…也别具一番魅力呢。
t_en: You mean "future." The future ruler of the holy city, Lady Goldweaver, is quite captivating in her own way.

t_ch: 说起来，两位刚才提到了「宴会」——可否烦请展开讲讲呢？
t_en: By the way, you both just mentioned a "banquet," could you elaborate on that?

t_ch: 对了，你们还不知道呢。每次战前胜后，凯撒都会举办一场属于黄金裔的盛会，鼓舞士气。
t_en: Oh, right, you don't know. Every time before a battle or after a victory, the Imperator holds a grand feast for the Chrysos Heirs, to lift our spirits.

t_ch: 对于我们这些常年洄游在生死间的战士，那是比胜利还值得期待的时刻。
t_en: For us warriors who swim constantly between life and death, these feasts are more worth looking forward to than victory.

t_ch: 呵…以欢宴作为猎杀欢宴之神的序曲，以蜜酿作为祭奠蜜酿之祖的贡品，真是荒诞。
t_en: Hah... A banquet to prelude the hunt for the god of banquets, and honey brew as a tribute to commemorate the ancestor of honey brew... How absurd.

t_ch: 别苦着脸了。大局已定，又是为{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}摆的盛宴，何不学学泰坦，活在当下，及时行乐？
t_en: Don't look so grim. All has been decided. Since it's a banquet for {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}, why not take a leaf out of the Titan's book, live in the moment and enjoy life to the fullest?

t_ch: 我可不似你那般自由自在。那只多洛斯小猫到处添乱，已经够让我烦心了。而且，我还得完成手上的制衣委托……
t_en: I'm not as carefree as you. That little Dolos kitten is already causing enough trouble for me, and on top of that, I still have tailoring commissions to complete...

t_ch: 等到火种将我的双眼点亮，可能就没法像以前一样专注了呢。
t_en: By the time the Coreflame illuminates my eyes, I might not be able to focus as I used to.

t_ch: 阿格莱雅的眼睛……
t_en: Aglaea's eyes...

t_ch: 好奇这双眼眸吗？人们常将它以珠宝相比。而我已经做好决定，要向「浪漫」换取能看清一切的眼睛。
t_en: Curious about these eyes? People often compare them to jewels. But I've already made my decision to ask "Romance" for eyes that can see everything.

t_ch: 不知等我接过神权，这个世界会变成什么样貌？
t_en: I wonder what this world will look like when I take the divine authority?

t_ch: 未来的你…依旧是这世上最棒的织者。
t_en: In the future, you... will still be the finest weaver in the world.

t_ch: 这也是命运三相降下的预言？
t_en: Is this also a prophecy from the Three Fates?

t_ch: 比预言还要准确哦。毕竟，{NICKNAME}已经亲眼见证过了，对吧？
t_en: It's even more accurate than a prophecy. After all, {NICKNAME} has already witnessed it, right?

t_ch: 你将会织出世上最浪漫的事物…
t_en: You will weave the most romantic thing in the world...

t_ch: 你将为众人筑就再创世的长阶…
t_en: You will forge the long stairs to Era Nova...

t_ch: 你将会沐浴在希望的金光之中…
t_en: You will bathe in the golden light of hope...

t_ch: 「成为半神，泯灭人性」——我无数次求告神谕，换来的只有这唯一一道回应。
t_en: "Become a demigod and lose your humanity." That is the only reply I've received in the countless times I've sought wisdom from the prophecy.

t_ch: 但命运的片段就像针脚，在被编织成为华服前，谁也看不清它真正的美貌，不是么？
t_en: But destiny's fragments are like stitches. Before they're threaded into splendid garments, no one can see their true charm, can they?

t_ch: 她一直被自己所要背负的神职烦忧。但多亏你们，阿格莱雅看起来精神多了。
t_en: Aglaea has always been troubled by the divine duty she must bear. But thanks to you, she seems to be in much better spirits.

t_ch: 她看起来挺释然的。
t_en: She looks quite relieved.

t_ch: 你们很熟悉吗？
t_en: Do you know each other well?

t_ch: 正如她熟谙纺车如何颤动，我也能从潮湿的空气中嗅出细微的变化。至于是否能谈得上熟悉…在她仍是孩子时，我便已与她共游。大部分时候，我能读懂她心里的泡泡就是了。
t_en: Just as she knows how the spinning wheel trembles, I can sense the smallest changes in the damp air. As for whether we know each other well... I've swum beside her since she was a child. Most of the time, I can understand the whispers in her heart.

t_ch: 她害羞未说出口的那些话，之后就由我代为敬你们一杯吧。现在，这座浴宫就分给你们歇脚……
t_en: For those words she was too shy to say herself, I'll raise a glass to you on her behalf. Now, I leave this bath chamber to you...

t_ch: …好好休息，做好准备：毕竟，我们每次把酒言欢，都可能是人生中最后的欢庆哪。
t_en: ...Rest well, and prepare yourselves. After all, every time we drink and talk could be the last celebration we have in this life.

t_ch: 海瑟音小姐把浴宫让给我们了呢…还真是随性呀。
t_en: Miss Hysilens has given us the bath chamber... It seems she really does do whatever she wants.

t_ch: 可以不必总是在凯撒视线下了。
t_en: Now we don't always have to be under the Imperator's watchful eye.

t_ch: 是啊。不过，她随时都有可能回来——聊重要的事，还得留个心眼才行。
t_en: Indeed. But she could return at any moment. If we're having an important discussion, we must remain vigilant.

t_ch: 这座浴宫本来就是我的。
t_en: This bath chamber was originally mine.

t_ch: 好啦好啦，将来会的。但现在客随主便，她也随时都有可能回来…聊重要的事，还得留个心眼才行。
t_en: Yeah, yeah, in the future. But for now, we're at the mercy of the host, and she could return at any moment... If we're having an important discussion, we must remain vigilant.

t_ch: 我们应该只是她的室友…
t_en: We're just her roommates...

t_ch: 听她的意思，确实。这也意味着她随时都有可能回来…聊重要的事，还得留个心眼才行。
t_en: It seems that way. This also means she could return at any moment... If we're having an important discussion, we must remain vigilant.

t_ch: 所以，抓紧机会，汇报一下目前的进展吧，别让天外的各位久等了……
t_en: So, let's seize the opportunity and report our current progress. We don't want to keep everyone beyond the sky waiting...

t_ch: …第一，那个头顶上插了蜡烛的小皇冠虽然没明说，但强硬地拒绝了你们接管「律法」的诉求…嗯，合情合理。
t_en: ...First, while that little empress with a candle stuck on her head didn't explicitly say it, she firmly rejected your request to take over the "Law"... Hmph, fair enough.

t_ch: 第二，来古士确实在这条时间线上，但他和那小皇冠有点关系，你们没办法找到他…呵，意料之中。
t_en: Second, Lygus is indeed in this timeline, but since he's somehow connected to that little empress, you have no way to find him... Hah, as expected.

t_ch: 啧啧，道阻且长啊……
t_en: Tsk tsk, the road ahead will be long and difficult...

t_ch: 我还没说呢，你都知道了？
t_en: I haven't even said anything, and you already know everything?

t_ch: 都是我猜的。怎么，猜中了？
t_en: It's all just a guess. What, did I guess right?

t_ch: 下次不许抢我台词。
t_en: Next time, don't steal my lines.

t_ch: …看来猜中了？下次嘛，看我心情。
t_en: ...Looks like I guessed right then? Next time, it'll depend on my mood.

t_ch: 啧啧，道阻且长啊。
t_en: Tsk tsk, the road ahead will be long and difficult.

t_ch: 还真像模像样。
t_en: Not a bad imitation.

t_ch: 既然你没反驳，那我就默认自己都猜中了。
t_en: Since you didn't refute anything, I'll just assume I guessed it all right.

t_ch: 我们这也有些进展，但谈不上什么好消息。时间有限，长话短说……
t_en: We've made some progress here too, but nothing to get too excited about. Our time is short, so let me summarize...

t_ch: 有关智械哥的来历：他编写的防火墙，使用的是十四行代数式——在{RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#22}利尔他{RUBY_E#}发明九字算法后，银河中早就不存在这种数学逻辑了。
t_en: Concerning the origin of that Intellitron: The firewall he created uses quatorzain algebraic expressions. But ever since {RUBY_B#Genius Society #22}Aiden{RUBY_E#} invented the nine-worded formulae, this kind of mathematical logic no longer exists in the cosmos.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>来古士一定和天才俱乐部脱不了干系，千万提高警惕。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Lygus is definitely connected to the Genius Society, so stay alert.</color>

t_ch: 难道是某位天才的造物…
t_en: Maybe he's the creation of some Genius...

t_ch: 他会和帝皇有关联吗？
t_en: Could he be related to the emperor?

t_ch: 万一是博识尊的思考单元…
t_en: What if he's the thinking unit of Nous...

t_ch: 首先排除机器头自己，祂主打一个事不关己高高挂起，不可能会亲自下场。但这家伙究竟是什么来头，我和螺丝还在逐一排除……
t_en: We can first exclude Droidhead THEMSELF. THEY specialize in minding THEIR own business and wouldn't intervene personally. But Screwy and I are still eliminating possibilities one by one...

t_ch: 目前最有可能的人选，这么几个：{RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#4}「寂静领主」{RUBY_E#}、{RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#23}阿茶{RUBY_E#}…噢，{RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#27与#66}两位鲁珀特{RUBY_E#}也算，但如果是他俩就太没劲了。
t_en: Currently, the most likely candidates are these few: the "{RUBY_B#Genius Society #4}Lord of Silence{RUBY_E#}," {RUBY_B#Genius Society #23}Acha{RUBY_E#}... Oh, the {RUBY_B#Genius Society #27 and #66}two Ruberts{RUBY_E#} are also possible, but it would be too boring if it were one of them.

t_ch: 我投「寂静领主」一票。
t_en: I vote for the "Lord of Silence."

t_ch: 我们暂时也这么怀疑，但还得进一步验证。
t_en: We also have the same suspicions for now, but further verification is needed.

t_ch: 连你们都得不出准确答案？
t_en: Even you can't come up with an accurate answer?

t_ch: 都说了，那家伙的技术既陈旧又复杂，还不亚于天才。但说到底，又不是星神，会搞定的。
t_en: I've told you, his technology is both outdated and complicated, no less than genius. But ultimately, he's not an Aeon. We can handle him.

t_ch: 总算能和大人物过过招了。
t_en: Finally, we'll get to face off with some big names.

t_ch: 要说的就是这些，世界内部就靠你们继续推进了。定期联系，记得别掉以轻心。
t_en: That's all I have to say. We'll depend on you to continue pushing things forward within this world. Keep in touch regularly, and remember, don't let your guard down.

t_ch: 黑塔阁下…真是风风火火呢。
t_en: Madam Herta is a real whirlwind.

t_ch: 那接下来，我们就以阿格莱雅提到的<color=#dbc291ff>宴会</color>为突破口吧。那时刻律德菈的亲信应该都会在场，也是一个和他们拉近距离的好机会。
t_en: Well then, let's use the <color=#dbc291ff>banquet</color> Aglaea mentioned as our next starting point. Cerydra's trusted followers should all be present at that time. It'll be a good opportunity to get closer to them.

t_ch: 要避免和来古士正面冲突。
t_en: We must avoid direct confrontation with Lygus.

t_ch: 到时候我们谨慎行动。
t_en: We'll operate carefully when the time comes.

t_ch: 嗯，就这么定！凭我们的默契，无论发生什么都能顺利解决的。
t_en: It's settled then! With our great teamwork, we'll be able to deal with anything that comes our way.

t_ch: 今天还真是漫长啊…差不多也到休息的时候啦。
t_en: It's been a long day... We should get some rest now.

t_ch: 好好休息，为宴会做准备吧。
t_en: Rest well and get ready for the banquet.

t_ch: 嗯！好好为宴会做准备吧♪
t_en: Yes! Let's get ready for the banquet ♪

t_ch: 我暂时还不想休息…
t_en: I don't feel like resting yet...

t_ch: 好呀，那玩累了记得回来哦，人家就在这边等你♪
t_en: Alright, when you've tired yourself out, remember to come back. I'll be waiting for you here ♪

t_ch: 对了，灵水盆。虽然刻律德菈说创世涡心已被封锁，但说不定…？
t_en: Oh right, the spirit basin. Even though Cerydra said the Vortex of Genesis was sealed off, perhaps...

t_ch: 试试看吧。
t_en: Let's give it a try.

t_ch: 按照记忆中重复了许多次的步骤，你将脸浸入灵水盆中，合上双目，屏住呼吸。
t_en: Following the steps you've repeated countless times in your memory, you submerge your face in the spirit basin, close your eyes, and hold your breath.

t_ch: 屏住呼吸……
t_en: Hold your breath...

t_ch: 屏住…呼吸……
t_en: Hold... your breath...

t_ch: 咳咳咳…人类的憋气是有极限的，而你从短暂的沉浸中学到一件事……
t_en: *cough*... There's a limit to how long humans can hold their breath, and from that brief immersion, you learned one thing...

t_ch: …果然，灵水盆和涡心的连通失效了呀。
t_en: ...Sure enough, the connection between the spirit basin and the Vortex of Genesis is gone.

t_ch: 追随凯撒远征…看来我们只有这一条路可走了呢。
t_en: It seems that following the Imperator on her expedition is the only path we can take.

t_ch: 不必尝试了。
t_en: No need to try.

t_ch: 也是。这种小事，她应该没理由向我们隐瞒。
t_en: You're right. She has no reason to hide such a trivial thing from us.

t_ch: 哼，至少悬锋人还会坚守自己的信仰…！
t_en: At least Kremnoans keep their faith...!

t_ch: 欸？那不是……
t_en: Wait, isn't that...?

t_ch: 凯撒麾下的其他英雄也在场……
t_en: The other heroes under the Imperator's command are here too...

t_ch: 如果有时间，要不要也接触一下？
t_en: Since we have time, should we go meet them?

t_ch: 这个轮回的元老们竟然…看来先前被处以极刑的祭司不是个例呀。
t_en: The Elders of this cycle were all... Looks like that priest who was sentenced to death wasn't an isolated case.

t_ch: 唔，他们好像要打起来了…我们快走。
t_en: Looks like things are getting heated... Let's get out of here.

t_ch: 哎呀～这么多人，不愧是圣城，好热闹呀～！
t_en: Oh, so many people! The holy city is so lively~!

t_ch: 听说了吗？
t_en: Did you hear?

t_ch: 嗐，正常…
t_en: Hah, as expected...

t_ch: 不知刻律德菈对我们隐瞒了多少，最坏的情况……
t_en: We don't know how much Cerydra has concealed from us. In the worst-case scenario...

t_ch: 我们要面对的敌人，恐怕不止一位呢。
t_en: We may have to face more than one enemy.

t_ch: 什么同盟会议…可笑！
t_en: Alliance Meeting... ridiculous!

t_ch: 不过，凯撒居然会对质疑「天外之界」的人下杀手吗？
t_en: But would the Imperator actually kill those who question the "world beyond the sky"?

t_ch: 这一点也和我们熟悉的奥赫玛截然相反……
t_en: This is the complete opposite from what we know of Okhema...

t_ch: 不知道城中最近都在热议什么……
t_en: I wonder what everyone in the city is talking about lately...

t_ch: 问问看吧。
t_en: Ask around.

t_ch: 嗯…要想深入了解凯撒的秘密，必须得过海瑟音小姐这关呢。
t_en: Hmm... to truly understand the Imperator's secrets, we have to get past Miss Hysilens.

t_ch: 凯撒到底要做什么……
t_en: What exactly is the Imperator doing...?

t_ch: 不要再开战了……
t_en: No more war...

t_ch: 又一轮逐火开始了吗？
t_en: Another round of Flame-Chase is starting?

t_ch: 又能见到凯撒了！
t_en: I get to see the Imperator again!

t_ch: 我看到救世主了！
t_en: I saw the Deliverer!

t_ch: 我们该怎么办啊……
t_en: What should we do...

t_ch: 暴君…疯女皇……
t_en: Tyrant... Mad Queen...

t_ch: 没有律法的黑暗之世……
t_en: A world plunged into lawless darkness...

t_ch: 凯撒大人太威武了！
t_en: The Great Imperator is so dignified!

t_ch: 凯撒万岁！逐火军万岁！
t_en: Long live the Imperator! Glory to the Flame-Chase Army!

t_ch: 这次战争我们也一定能胜利！
t_en: We'll win this war too!

t_ch: 听说了吗？又要打仗了。
t_en: Did you hear? Another war's coming.

t_ch: 唉，又是一场灾难……
t_en: Alas, yet another disaster...

t_ch: 黄金裔们简直是纷争的化身……
t_en: The Chrysos Heirs are just the Incarnation of Strife...

t_ch: 嘘——别说这种不要命的话！
t_en: Shh! You'll get yourself killed saying things like that!

t_ch: 我们还是早日逃去其他城邦吧？
t_en: We better flee to another city-state while we still can, huh?

t_ch: 但是，在凯撒的统治下是最安全的……
t_en: But it's safest under the Imperator's rule...

t_ch: 又要跟泰坦开战了，真是期待……
t_en: A war with the Titans again? I can't wait...

t_ch: 凯撒的逐火军，未尝一败！
t_en: The Imperator's Flame-Chase Army has never lost!

t_ch: 有人看到救世主也来这边了！
t_en: Someone said the Deliverer showed up here too!

t_ch: 啊？救世主也是要洗澡的吗？
t_en: Huh? Even the Deliverer takes baths?

t_ch: 该死的拉冬人，竟敢对凯撒不敬……
t_en: Those insolent Ladonians! How dare they disrespect the Imperator...

t_ch: 哼，凯撒的律法一定饶不了他！
t_en: Hmph. He will receive no mercy under the Imperator's law!

t_ch: 两位贵客，留步。进入会场前，请交出随身携带的物品。
t_en: Honored guests, wait here for a moment. You must surrender any personal belongings you have on you before entering the venue.

t_ch: 嗯…每次这位英雄一登场，气氛就会瞬间冷下来呢。
t_en: Eh... This hero always brings down the vibe whenever he shows up.

t_ch: 凯撒身居高位，必须审慎细致。为避免不必要的误会，请两位照我说的做吧。
t_en: The Imperator's elevated position means she must always remain meticulous and careful. Please, do as I say, guests. It would avoid unnecessary misunderstandings.

t_ch: 宴会不能自带酒水可以理解，书本和羽毛笔…也要没收吗？
t_en: I get that you don't want people to bring outside food into the banquet, but is it really necessary to confiscate... books and quill pens?

t_ch: 只要使用得当，羽毛笔也能化作凶器。所有随身物品——「所有」——昔涟小姐。
t_en: Even a quill pen can become a deadly weapon in the right hands. I'm asking for all your items. All, Miss Cyrene.

t_ch: 放心吧。你们的物品，会由专人妥善保管。
t_en: Your belongings will remain safe. They will be looked after appropriately by dedicated staff.

t_ch: 「专人」…「妥善」…尽是些微妙的词呢。
t_en: "Looked after appropriately"? "Dedicated staff"? Talk about a vague choice of words...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，看来对方是冲着<color=#dbc291ff>识刻锚</color>来的呀。要怎么做？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, it seems like he's aiming specifically for the <color=#dbc291ff>Chronocognitive Anchor</color>. What should we do?

t_ch: 将计就计，交给他吧。
t_en: Go with their plan and hand it to him.

t_ch: 果然，我们心有灵犀呢！将计就计，把识刻锚交给他「保管」吧？
t_en: Nice. You read my mind! Let's go with their plan and hand over the Chronocognitive Anchor to be "looked after."

t_ch: 毕竟小凯撒对{NICKNAME}那么关注，我们和天才的悄悄话多半已经传进她的耳朵了。人家都能猜到接下来的发展……
t_en: After all, if the little Imperator is paying this much attention to {NICKNAME}, she probably already knows all about our whispered conversation with the Geniuses. I can pretty much guess what'll happen next...

t_ch: 但这反而会成为我们的「捷径」，对吧？
t_en: But that's actually gonna be our "shortcut," right?

t_ch: 我想听听你的直觉。
t_en: What does your gut tell you?

t_ch: 我的直觉吗……
t_en: My gut feeling, huh...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，这里不妨将计就计，把识刻锚交给他「保管」吧？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, why don't we go with their plan and hand over the Chronocognitive Anchor to be "looked after."

t_ch: 毕竟小凯撒对{NICKNAME}那么关注，我们和天才的悄悄话多半已经传进她的耳朵了。人家都能猜到接下来的发展……
t_en: After all, if the little Imperator is paying this much attention to {NICKNAME}, she probably already knows all about our whispered conversation with the Geniuses. I can pretty much guess what'll happen next...

t_ch: 但这反而会成为我们的「捷径」，对吧？
t_en: But that's actually gonna be our "shortcut," right?

t_ch: 不妙，这是个圈套。
t_en: Not good. This is a trap.

t_ch: 是呀。虽然早有预感，但没想到会这么直接……
t_en: True. I had a feeling it would come to this, but I didn't expect such a direct demand...

t_ch: 不过，{NICKNAME}，听我说，这里不妨将计就计，把识刻锚交给他「保管」吧？
t_en: But listen, {NICKNAME}, why don't we go with their plan and hand over the Chronocognitive Anchor to be "looked after"?

t_ch: 毕竟小凯撒对{NICKNAME}那么关注，我们和天才的悄悄话多半已经传进她的耳朵了。人家都能猜到接下来的发展……
t_en: After all, if the little Imperator is paying this much attention to {NICKNAME}, she probably already knows all about our whispered conversation with the Geniuses. I can pretty much guess what'll happen next...

t_ch: 但是你想，这反而会成为我们的「捷径」，对吧？
t_en: But... think about it. That's actually gonna be our "shortcut."

t_ch: 明白你的意思。
t_en: I understand.

t_ch: 相信你的直觉。
t_en: I'll trust your gut feeling.

t_ch: 我就知道，{NICKNAME}和我最默契啦。
t_en: I knew it. {NICKNAME} and I can practically read each other's minds~

t_ch: 两位？
t_en: Guests?

t_ch: 好啦好啦，会配合你的，给——请替我们转告凯撒：无论何时何地，她都可以信任{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Alright, alright. We'll listen to you. Here you go. Also, please pass on a message to the Imperator from us: She can trust {NICKNAME} anywhere, anytime.

t_ch: 感谢配合。凯撒有些急务要处理，稍后便会赴宴。
t_en: Thank you for your cooperation. The Imperator has some urgent business she needs to attend to and will arrive shortly.

t_ch: 两位不妨先随客人们一道入场，好好享受。
t_en: Why don't you head in with the other guests first and enjoy the feast?

t_ch: …啊，你们好！欢迎来参加宴宴宴会！
t_en: ...Ah! Hello! W—Welcome to the b—b—ba—banquet!

t_ch: 你们好啊~
t_en: Hello to you too~

t_ch: 真是热闹的宴会啊。
t_en: What a lively party!

t_ch: 其实我们有更要紧的事…
t_en: Actually, we've got more urgent matters to attend to...

t_ch: 果然，救世主也来了。正巧小维吉妮娅在犹豫要不要去找你呢。
t_en: Ah. So the Deliverer is attending this event, as expected. Little Verginia here was just wondering whether she should go find you.

t_ch: 身为凯撒大人的史官，我负责为逐火军的各位撰写诗篇。但对于自己，我却不知该如何落笔。
t_en: A—As the Great Imperator's historian, I'm responsible for composing poems and songs for everyone in the Flame-Chase Army. But... I have no idea how I should record myself in the annals.

t_ch: 小维吉妮娅想请二位浅浅「透露」一下她的未来，好找到提笔的灵感。
t_en: Little Verginia is wondering whether you can "let slip" a hint or two about her future, so she can find some inspiration to write about herself.

t_ch: 这…不太好吧？况且我们也不认识将来的她呀。
t_en: That... doesn't sound like a good idea. Besides, we don't even know her in the future.

t_ch: 可如果就这么回答，她恐怕会更失落…{NICKNAME}，该怎么办？
t_en: But she'll probably get really disappointed if we tell her that... What should we do, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 直接告诉她不能说。
t_en: Tell her bluntly that we can't do that.

t_ch: 用一些委婉的说法…
t_en: Give a roundabout refusal...

t_ch: 编造一个善意的谎言。
t_en: Make up a white lie.

t_ch: 好，我明白啦。
t_en: Alright. I got it.

t_ch: 虽然不能透露太多，但人家觉得，不妨就以「未来」开篇吧？
t_en: We can't reveal too much, but I think it wouldn't hurt to start your poem with "The Future."

t_ch: 嗯，比如…「我心怀憧憬，为自己写下明天的寓言。静静守候，直到明天又一个明天之后，它兑现如约而至的诺言」…类似这样？
t_en: Maybe use something like... "With hope, I write down the tale of tomorrow for myself, silently waiting, day after day, till the moment it fulfills its promise..." How's that?
That's...

t_ch: …就是这个调！我、我突然文思泉涌！
t_en: ...That's exactly what I'm after! I—I'm so inspired!

t_ch: 谢谢你！我有种预感，等回来后，我就能把《落木逐火英雄纪》完结了。
t_en: Thank you so much! I feel like I can actually finish composing the Heroic Saga of Flame-Chase once we end this campaign.

t_ch: 阿波罗尼点了点头，对你们的回答表示赞许。
t_en: Apollonius nodded, showing approval of your answers.

t_ch: 即兴发挥不错。
t_en: Pretty good for some improv.

t_ch: 不是即兴发挥哦？人家背过的，就等着在你面前显摆一下，嘻！
t_en: Hey, that wasn't improvised, you know? I memorized it so I could show it off to you. Teehee~

t_ch: 你这套说法…还真泛用。
t_en: That line of yours was quite versatile...

t_ch: 嘻，这就是说话的艺术，跟{NICKNAME}学的，像吗？
t_en: Teehee, and that's the art of conversation! I learned it from {NICKNAME}, after all. So, how did I do?

t_ch: 对了，作为交换，两位能告诉我们，凯撒在哪儿吗？
t_en: By the way, in return for that, are you able to tell us where the Imperator is?

t_ch: 凯撒？她一般不会这么早就步入席中。按她的话说，爱臣私语的话所，君王应该保持沉默。
t_en: The Imperator? She usually wouldn't arrive this early. She believes that rulers should stay silent in places where their subjects hold private conversations.

t_ch: 在她登场前，不如与我们共饮一杯吧——敬含而不露的理性。
t_en: Why don't we have a toast before she arrives? To reason, which is held but not revealed.

t_ch: 敬…必有回响的浪漫。
t_en: To... romance, which will surely echo.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，浪漫的结局…喝几罐蜜酿庆祝一下。
t_en: Hehe, what a romantic conclusion... Let me have a few jars of honey brew as a treat.

t_ch: 记得别喝太多……
t_en: Now now, don't drink too much...

t_ch: 阿雅，要是你喝不惯蜜酿，*我们*就去要一口锅，给你煮些燕麦粥喝。
t_en: Agy, if you can't get used to the honey brew, we will go ask for a pot and cook some oatmeal for you.

t_ch: 不用啦。只是这宴会太过吵闹，有趣的人和事又太少，有些待不住罢了。
t_en: No need for that. This banquet is just too loud, and nothing and no one here is interesting. I just don't really want to be here.

t_ch: 骗人，明明从浴宫回来时还很精神来着。让我猜猜，是在操心谁的事，海瑟音？还是小赛飞儿？
t_en: Lies. You were pretty energized when you came back from the bath chamber. Lemme guess... Are you worrying about someone? About Hysilens? Or little Cipher?

t_ch: 你就是性格太认真，这样下去，以后会很辛苦的。
t_en: You take everything too seriously. At this rate, life's gonna be real tough for you later on.

t_ch: 吾师，恐怕你最没资格说我了。
t_en: You're the least qualified to lecture me about that, teacher.

t_ch: 在犹豫吗？
t_en: Are you hesitating?

t_ch: 也许不要打扰她们…
t_en: Maybe it's better to not disturb them...

t_ch: 呀，两位，是来找*我们*的吗？我的意思是，找缇宝还是阿雅？
t_en: Ahh, dear guests. Are you here for us? I mean... are you here for Tribbie or Agy?

t_ch: …啊，没有。只是想问问，二位见过凯撒吗？
t_en: ...Ah. No. I'm just wondering whether you've seen the Imperator?

t_ch: 凯撒？那*我们*不知道哦。
t_en: The Imperator? No. We haven't.

t_ch: 那位君主向来我行我素。她虽赐我们爵名，却不会与任何人分享行踪。
t_en: Our sovereign has always acted however she pleases. Though she gave us ranks, she'd never tell anyone her whereabouts.

t_ch: 或许，她的眼中只能容下棋子，还有王冠上映出的苍穹吧。
t_en: Perhaps the only thing she tolerates are chess pieces... and the sky reflected upon her crown.

t_ch: 这样啊……
t_en: I see...

t_ch: 两位怎么愁眉苦脸的？这副表情可不适合「救世主」啊。
t_en: Why do you two look so distressed? That's not what the Deliverer should look like.

t_ch: 机会难得，不如一起碰个杯吧，趁我们还有享受欢欣的时光——敬下一个千年的命运与牺牲。
t_en: Why don't we have a toast, while we still have time for pleasure? Here, to the destinies and sacrifices of the next millennium.

t_ch: 那*我们*就敬——解放命运的明天！
t_en: Then we will toast too. To the tomorrow that will set fate free!

t_ch: 敬逐火之旅！
t_en: To the Flame-Chase Journey!

t_ch: 敬缇宝和阿格莱雅！
t_en: To Tribbie and Aglaea!

t_ch: 敬新世界！
t_en: Hail to the New World!

t_ch: 干杯——
t_en: Cheers!

t_ch: 果然，比起蜜酿，还是燕麦粥更适合*我们*。
t_en: Called it. Oatmeal suits us way better than honey brew.

t_ch: …记得帮我也盛一碗，吾师。
t_en: ...Please give me a bowl as well, teacher.

t_ch: 二位贵客，还有什么事吗？难道是想听我唠唠凯撒大人的事迹？
t_en: Is there anything else we can help you with, dear guests? Or do you want me to recount the Great Imperator's heroic deeds?

t_ch: 哟，拉比努斯，我从地窖里搞到了学者们私藏的蜜酿，来品品？
t_en: Hey, Labienus! I managed to get some honey brew that the scholars hid in the cellar. Wanna try it?

t_ch: 这算不算醉酒上岗？
t_en: Wouldn't this be considered getting drunk on duty?

t_ch: 哈哈…「冬霖爵」主动找我小酌，我当然不好推辞。
t_en: Hahaha... I'd never refuse to share a drink with Dux Brumalis, especially if she seeks me out first.

t_ch: 贵客无须担心，宴会的安保不会因此削弱分毫——她根本喝不过我！
t_en: Don't worry, dear guests. The banquet's security won't be compromised. I'd never get drunk before her!

t_ch: 不许喝！
t_en: No drinking on the job!

t_ch: 哈哈…「冬霖爵」主动找我小酌，我当然不好推辞。
t_en: Hahaha... I'd never refuse to share a drink with Dux Brumalis, especially if she seeks me out first.

t_ch: 贵客无须担心，宴会的安保不会因此削弱分毫——她根本喝不过我！
t_en: Don't worry, dear guests. The banquet's security won't be compromised. I'd never get drunk before her!

t_ch: 我也想喝。
t_en: I want some too.

t_ch: 这场宴会的蜜酿不限量供应，两位也可尝尝，看看它是否比天外的琼浆更加醇厚。
t_en: This banquet has a never-ending flow of honey brew. You are welcome to try it and see whether our drinks are as good as those from beyond the sky.

t_ch: 谢谢你的好意。不过…我们更想知道，凯撒什么时候回来？
t_en: Thank you for the offer, but... we're more interested in knowing when the Imperator will be back.

t_ch: 凯撒？呵，谁知道，估计又躲在什么地方想歪点子吧。要我说，她从来就没正眼瞧过我们这些为她拼命的战士……
t_en: The Imperator? Hah. Who knows? Maybe she's hiding somewhere thinking up weird ideas again. If you ask me, she's never treated us soldiers properly, even though we put our necks on the line for her...

t_ch: 塞涅卡，这话我可不能当作没听见。要么把它收回去，要么就和我一决高下！
t_en: Hey. I can't pretend I didn't hear that, Seneca. Either retract your statement or duel me!

t_ch: 好啊——侍从，再拿十罐蜜酿来，今天我要把他喝到不能直立行走！
t_en: Fine by me. Attendant! Bring us ten more jars of honey brew! I'm gonna make sure he can't even stand straight by the end of this!

t_ch: 净说大话，先小心你自己的肚皮吧！
t_en: You wish. Be careful you don't get drunk first!

t_ch: 侍从，再拿十罐蜜酿来，今天我要把他喝到不能直立行走！
t_en: Attendant! Bring us ten more jars of honey brew! I'm gonna make sure he can't even stand straight by the end of this!

t_ch: 净说大话，先小心你自己的肚皮吧！
t_en: You wish. Be careful you don't get drunk first!

t_ch: 听说了吗？等这一仗打完，逐火之旅就顺利结束了。
t_en: Did you hear that the Flame-Chase Journey will end after we win this campaign?

t_ch: 啊？不是还有那么多泰坦没讨伐吗？
t_en: Huh? But there are so many Titans we haven't fought yet!

t_ch: 哎呀，天外的救世主都来了，何必再像以前那样走流程？我们很快就可以回家了！
t_en: C'mon. The Deliverer from beyond the sky is here, so we don't need to follow the process like before! We'll be able to go home soon!

t_ch: 讨伐法吉娜…是不是要到海里去作战？
t_en: Campaigning against Phagousa... Does that mean we need to fight in the ocean?

t_ch: …现在学游泳还来得及吗？
t_en: ...Is it too late to start learning how to swim?

t_ch: 你说，天外之界到底是什么样的？
t_en: What do you think the world beyond the sky looks like?

t_ch: 想知道？自己去问那两个救世主啊。
t_en: If you're curious, just go ask those two Deliverers.

t_ch: 还是算了。他们来自「天空」，万一像艾格勒一样会打雷呢？
t_en: Ehh, maybe not. They're from the "Sky"... What if they can summon thunder like Aquila?

t_ch: 两位四处徘徊，像是揣着什么心事。莫非是侍从招待不周？
t_en: You two have been wandering around the venue as if you have something on your mind. Have the attendants not taken care of you well?

t_ch: 两位四处徘徊，也不与旁人交杯，莫非是侍从招待不周？
t_en: You two have been wandering around the venue and haven't mingled with anyone. Have the attendants not taken care of you well?

t_ch: 不会不会。我们很享受！只是…见凯撒迟迟未到，心里难免有些惴惴不安。
t_en: No! No! We love it here! It's just... We're a little concerned, seeing how the Imperator still hasn't arrived.

t_ch: 别心急，我知道两位在等什么。
t_en: Don't worry. I know what you've been waiting for.

t_ch: 来，陪我坐一小会儿吧？我有个私人的秘密想同你们分享。
t_en: Come. Sit with me for a while, will you? I'd like to share a personal secret with you.

t_ch: 请看……
t_en: See here...

t_ch: 这是<color=#dbc291ff>法吉娜的神血蜜露</color>，十二宝瓶中最为甜美的一樽。
t_en: This is <color=#dbc291ff>Phagousa's Dew of Divine Blood</color>, the sweetest of all the twelve bottles.

t_ch: 在这历史变革的前夜，如此奇珍，我想邀「救世主」共饮。
t_en: On the night before such a historical event, I'd like to share this marvelous drink with the "Deliverer."

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，这算自带酒水了吧？果然，安检就是针对我们的。
t_en: Doesn't this count as bringing in outside food, {NICKNAME}? I knew that security check was targeted at us.

t_ch: 两位，怎么了？
t_en: What's the matter, guests?

t_ch: 有些…受宠若惊呢。
t_en: Oh! We're... simply overwhelmed by such an honor.

t_ch: 是担心我在蜜露中布了毒饵？那么，请让我自证清白。
t_en: Are you worried that I might have poisoned the Dew? Well then, let me prove my innocence.

t_ch: 海瑟音举杯饮下蜜露，故意展露出脖颈，好让你将液体流经咽喉的过程收入眼中。
t_en: Hysilens raises the goblet of Honeydew to her lips, deliberately arching her neck so you could watch the liquid's descent down her throat as she swallows.

t_ch: 看吧，十分安全。
t_en: See? It's completely safe.

t_ch: 总觉得海瑟音小姐想和我们谈些什么…先配合她吧？
t_en: I feel like Miss Hysilens wants to talk to us about something... Why don't we go along with her for now?

t_ch: 那我就不客气了。
t_en: Then I'll gladly accept it.

t_ch: 得先换一只杯子。
t_en: I want a new cup for myself.

t_ch: 呵，真是条机敏的鱼儿。
t_en: Hah. You're a pretty sharp fish.

t_ch: 未成年人不得饮酒…
t_en: Minors shouldn't drink...

t_ch: 安心。蜜露并非酒酿，不会令人迷醉。
t_en: Worry not. Honeydew is not alcohol. It won't get you drunk.

t_ch: 恰恰相反，它能让你更加清醒。
t_en: On the contrary, it can make your mind... even sharper.

t_ch: 眨眼间，陶杯贴上了你的嘴唇。不愧是凯撒御用的锋刃，翁法罗斯最敏捷的剑士。
t_en: The clay cup touches your lips in the blink of an eye. She is indeed the imperial blade of the Imperator and the swiftest swordmaster in Amphoreus.

t_ch: 还请，细细品尝。
t_en: Please. Have a taste.

t_ch: 小海兔，你也一起？
t_en: Would you like some too, little sea hare?

t_ch: 人、人家还是自己来吧……
t_en: I—I can drink it myself...

t_ch: 咕…咕……
t_en: Glug... glug...

t_ch: 如何，甜吗？
t_en: How is it? Sweet enough?

t_ch: 还不错…
t_en: It's not bad...

t_ch: 喜欢便好。
t_en: As long as you like it.

t_ch: 味道有些…复杂。
t_en: It has a... very complex taste.

t_ch: 时而平静、时而猛烈，这便是「海洋」的滋味。在启程面对法吉娜的波涛前，你理应先熟悉它的善变。
t_en: Calm at times, tempestuous at others... That's the taste of the "Ocean." It'll do you good to understand Phagousa's fickleness before we set off to face their waves.

t_ch: 就像此时此刻，两位将见证这蜜露中蕴含的秘密……
t_en: Just like how you are about to understand the secrets within this Dew...

t_ch: 现在，请转过头去，轻轻地——不要发出任何响动。
t_en: Now, please turn around. Very. Very. Quietly. Don't make a single noise.
Ahh...!

t_ch: 凯撒？何时出现的…
t_en: The Imperator!? When did she...

t_ch: 来古士！他果然在这里。
t_en: Lygus! I knew he'd be here!

t_ch: 这是？你做了什么…
t_en: What... What did you do...?

t_ch: 其余诸神的蜜露皆会引人沉醉，唯独欢宴之神的蜜露……
t_en: The Dew of other gods all intoxicate humans, but the God of Banquets' Dew...

t_ch: 是能将人们从海妖的迷魂歌谣中唤醒的「解药」。
t_en: Is an "antidote" that can awaken humans from a sea siren's enchanting song.

t_ch: 打从宴会开始，众宾客就被我的歌声催眠，他们看不见凯撒和那位神礼官。
t_en: Since the start of this banquet, all the guests have been under the spell of my song. None of them can see the Imperator and that Theoros.

t_ch: 但二位——我希望你们拥有清醒的视野。
t_en: But you two... I wish for you to see the truth.

t_ch: 这是…凯撒的授意？
t_en: Is this... also what the Imperator wants?

t_ch: 是我的私人请求。我…无法信任那位神礼官。
t_en: This is my personal request. I... can't bring myself to trust that Theoros.

t_ch: 自从他和欧洛尼斯的神谕一同降临，将群星的预言带给奥赫玛，逐火军就变了。他的低语难以抗拒，包藏祸心，令野心障目的人们一一踩入陷阱。
t_en: The Flame-Chase Army changed after he descended with Oronyx's divination and brought the prophecy of the stars to Okhema. His seductive whispers harbor something malicious within and will ensnare those of us blinded by ambition.

t_ch: 你们是预言中的「救世主」，对他的了解远胜过我。或许，只有你们能从其人言行中发觉一丝端倪……
t_en: You are the "Deliverers" of the prophecy and know about him far more than I do. Perhaps only you can find traces of the truth from his actions and words...

t_ch: 然后，为凯撒展示正确的道路。
t_en: Then, we can show the Imperator the right path forward.

t_ch: 可这么做…不是自作主张吗？
t_en: But... isn't this acting behind her back?

t_ch: 翁法罗斯已经太过脆弱，就连捍卫她的英勇行为也必须藏在水面下。身为凯撒的锋刃，我必须在暗流中为她开辟前路……
t_en: Amphoreus has become far too weak. Even heroic actions protecting her from harm must be conducted under the water's surface. I am the Imperator's blade, and I must clear the way for her while remaining concealed in the torrents...

t_ch: 然后，把剑指向真正的敌人。
t_en: Then, ensure I'm pointing my sword towards the true enemy.

t_ch: 海瑟音小姐，能答应我一个请求吗？
t_en: Can you promise me something, Miss Hysilens?

t_ch: 但说无妨。
t_en: Speak your mind.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}此行前来，正是为了阻止那个坏人的阴谋。我们的立场是一致的。
t_en: {NICKNAME} has in fact come here to stop that villain's evil scheme. Our goals are aligned.

t_ch: 但凯撒要做的选择…{NICKNAME}从无僭越之意。我们只想把知道的一切坦诚相告，毫无保留。
t_en: But as to the decision the Imperator must make... {NICKNAME} has no wish to transgress her authority. We just want to tell her everything we know.

t_ch: 我相信，凯撒自会明辨是非。
t_en: I believe the Imperator will be able to tell right from wrong.

t_ch: 当然，我从不怀疑二位的忠诚，也定会如实传达。
t_en: I never doubted your loyalty. I'll pass your words faithfully on to her.

t_ch: 但前提是，你我能在这场拉锯中取得优势。
t_en: ...Provided we can gain the advantage in this tug-of-war, that is.

t_ch: 现在，回到宴会中去吧。带上这酒杯，保持距离，假装你们还沉浸在海妖的幻境中……
t_en: Now, return to the feast. Bring this cup with you and keep your distance. Pretend you are still immersed in the sea siren's fantasia...

t_ch: 我会控制水汽，让你们能像深海鲸兽那般听见远方的声音，听清交谈的细节。
t_en: And I'll control the moisture in the air. That way, you'll be able to listen to sounds from afar, as if you are a whale of the depths, and hear every word of their conversation.

t_ch: 祝二位，旗开得胜。
t_en: I wish you a victory in this first skirmish.

t_ch: 太近了，会被发现的啦！
t_en: We're too close! They'll notice us!

t_ch: 这里！混进人群中去吧？
t_en: Let's mingle in the crowds here.

t_ch: 放松，放松，表现得自然些。
t_en: Relax. Relax. Try to act natural.

t_ch: 凯撒人呢，怎么还不现身？那小矮子，平日对谁都一副颐指气使的样子！今天我就要、就要……
t_en: Where's the Imperator? Still not here? That little imp is always acting so high and mighty towards everyone! Today, I will... I will...!

t_ch: …算了，再给我一杯！
t_en: ...Whatever. Pour me another cup!

t_ch: 即便已被醉意战胜，此人仍不敢挑战您的权威哪。
t_en: Though she has succumbed to drunkenness, she still does not dare challenge your authority.

t_ch: 胆敢妄议我的身高，仅这一点就足够将她碎尸万段。
t_en: A criticism of my height is a grave enough insult already. She should be dismembered.

t_ch: 您时常以这种方式考验臣子的忠诚么？
t_en: Do you often test the loyalty of your subjects like this?

t_ch: 可笑。凯撒不需要愚忠之人，只需证明自己尚有价值，我便愿意网开一面。
t_en: You jest. The Imperator does not need blind loyalty. As long as one can prove they have value, I am willing to be lenient towards them.

t_ch: 说正事吧，神礼官：倘若我通过试炼，将此世「律法」执握在手。下一步，你打算怎么做？
t_en: Let's cut to the chase, Theoros. If I pass the trial and grasp this world's "Law" in my hands, what will you do then?

t_ch: 答案显而易见，我会将翁法罗斯与群星相连……
t_en: The answer is simple. I will connect Amphoreus with the stars...

t_ch: 别说废话。简洁、具体，我不会提醒第二次。
t_en: Don't waste my time. Be precise. Be specific. I won't ask a second time.

t_ch: 容我更正：<color=#dbc291ff>我会修正旧日「律法」中封闭翁法罗斯的条约，并将黑潮汇入再创世的涡流。</color>
t_en: Allow me to adjust my statement: <color=#dbc291ff>I will correct the regulations within the old "Law" that sealed off Amphoreus, and merge the black tide with the torrents of Era Nova.</color>

t_ch: 如此，我们便能痛击企图扼杀「铁墓」的天外势力，为您将要踏上的无尽征途吹响启程的号角。
t_en: Then, we will be able to decimate the forces beyond the sky that are trying to annihilate Irontomb, and sound the trumpet for the endless campaign you will then embark on.

t_ch: 可你分明说过，铁墓在星间无可匹敌，何人胆敢扬言扼杀？
t_en: But you previously said that Irontomb is unrivaled in power across the stars. Who would dare to annihilate it?

t_ch: 名为「仙舟联盟」的战舰联邦，好战、守旧；名为「天才俱乐部」的教团，松散、却极端疯狂；还有「星穹列车」，一群无法的流浪者……
t_en: There is a federation of warships named the Xianzhou Alliance, warlike and old-fashioned. A cult named the Genius Society, loosely organized but steeped in abject insanity. There's also the Astral Express, a group of lawless vagrants...

t_ch: 所谓「救世主」也是其中一员。这群流民误以为自己能串联群星，以同盟替代征服，然而历史早已给出当头棒喝。
t_en: That so-called "Deliverer" is part of that last group. Those vagabonds mistakenly believe they can connect the stars through alliances instead of conquest, but history has already given them a tough lesson.

t_ch: 诸如此类，不胜枚举。但待到绝灭大君席卷寰宇，他们都将臣服于您的「毁灭」帝国。
t_en: There are countless other organizations besides, but when the Lord Ravager sweeps across the cosmos, they will certainly all bow before your empire of Destruction.

t_ch: 奥赫玛盟军…无往不胜！
t_en: The Okheman Alliance... is invincible!

t_ch: …倘若那些文明不像你所说的这般虚弱，倒还有及锋一试的价值。
t_en: ...If those civilizations are not as feeble as you describe, then they may still have some value in testing the quality of my blade.

t_ch: 不过，再渺小的城邦也应当为凯撒树立方尖碑，以便世人随时想起她征服时的威光。
t_en: That being said, even the smallest and weakest city-states should build an obelisk to the Imperator, so that their people can constantly recall the glory of her conquests.

t_ch: 随我再走几步吧，神礼官。
t_en: Walk a little longer with me, Theoros.

t_ch: 瞧这走向，不太妙呀。咱们这位小凯撒，好像对「毁灭」充满了兴趣……
t_en: I don't like how this is going. Our little Imperator seems fascinated by the Destruction...

t_ch: 灰鱼儿，小海兔，他们似乎还在商议。再靠近些吧，我会继续为你们传音……
t_en: Gray fry? Little sea hare? It seems like they're still talking. Get closer. I'll keep carrying their voices to you...

t_ch: 呃，好像是有点喝多了…没想到果汁也能上头。
t_en: I think I had too much... Didn't think you could get drunk on fruit juice.

t_ch: 真为难啊。无论如何布局，法吉娜这一战…牺牲在所难免。
t_en: What a difficult situation... No matter how we position our forces, this battle against Phagousa... will result in many casualties.

t_ch: 这不是你我该考虑的事。凯撒已经落子，我们只需为她冲锋陷阵，直至最后一刻。
t_en: That's not something you or I should consider. The Imperator has already placed the chess pieces. We just need to fight for her until our last breath.

t_ch: 令人感叹。您麾下的将领虽性格各异，却同样忠诚……
t_en: How astonishing. The commanders under you have such different personalities, yet they share the same loyalty...
...Hmm?

t_ch: 呀，他往这边看了！快，随便做点什么，假装看不见他们——
t_en: Ah, he's looking this way! Quick, do something and pretend we can't see them...

t_ch: 狂饮眼前的蜜露！
t_en: Gulp down the honeydew in front of you!

t_ch: 咕嘟……
t_en: Glug...

t_ch: 咕嘟…咕嘟咕嘟……
t_en: Glug... Glug glug...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，慢、慢慢来！
t_en: {NICKNAME}! S—Slow down!

t_ch: 咕嘟咕嘟咕嘟……
t_en: Glug glug glug...

t_ch: 呃…你还好吗？
t_en: Um... Are you okay?

t_ch: 和旁边的宴会客搭讪。
t_en: Chat with the guests next to you.

t_ch: …你有这么高速运转的毁灭进入翁法罗斯。
t_en: ...So you have this super duper speedy rotation of Destruction into Amphoreus.
...Huh?

t_ch: 噢，我知道了，是那个吧？
t_en: Oh, I got it. It's tha—that thing, right?

t_ch: ——研发这个金血的原理是哀地里亚管！
t_en: The one behind the research and development of this golden blood principle is Aidonia's manager!

t_ch: 坏了，伙伴…你好像遇到高手啦？
t_en: Oh dear. Seems like you've met your match, partner.

t_ch: 我现在充满灵感，轻轻松松啦。
t_en: I'm so full of inspiration right now! And I feel so light!

t_ch: 和昔涟玩个游戏。
t_en: Play a game with Cyrene.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}…你做什么呢？
t_en: {NICKNAME}... What are you doing?

t_ch: 被这么热烈地盯着…人家真的会害羞的哦？
t_en: Staring at me like that so intently... it's making me feel shy.

t_ch: 不要笑…挑战。
t_en: A try-not-to-laugh... challenge.
